item.title: Little Grape Land Recalls Nursing Pillows Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Suffocation; Violate Mandatory Standards for Nursing Pillows and Infant Support Cushions
item.company: Online at Amazon.com from August 2025 through April 2026 for between $28 and $30.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com from August 2025 through April 2026 for between $28 and $30.
item.summary: This recall involves Little Grape Land Nursing Pillows. The nursing pillows are U-shaped and come in a rose floral, alligator, bear, butterfly, cactus, construction truck, forest deer, green leaves, little bunny, spring flower and woodland animal patterns. There are no markings or labels on the product.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Little Grape Land Nursing Pillows.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled nursing pillows immediately and contact Little Grape Land for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to cut the pillow in half and send a photo of the destroyed pillow to recall@evermorepartner.com.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
